name: codex-sdlc
description: Codex-first SDLC workflow for solo-heavy, trunk-based development with local skills and git guardrails.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex with repo-local skills, AGENTS.md routing, lightweight Bash hooks, and a direct-to-trunk workflow that avoids PR-first defaults and force-push habits.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this repo for Codex-first trunk-based development
Review my changes before I commit directly to trunk
Help me ship this safely without opening a PR
